MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,795.00 FILED BY HANFORD, FREUND & COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT RUBINO, KATHRYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
